title: All images in quay.io show deleted

comments.body: There's a big notice on the info page about potential image corruption https://quay.io/repository/containers/skopeo?tab=info

@katlol There is no workaround at the moment.  We are working as fast as possible to get at least `:latest` images up there today, others as we can.  For updates, please follow the discussion on Podman's GitHub site: https://github.com/containers/podman/discussions/19796

Closing here.

Had success building my own image via GitHub Actions... for what it is worth.

https://github.com/katlol/containers
